name: cline-sdk
tagline: Reference/dispatch skill for the Cline Agent SDK — decision trees routing to detailed reference files per API surface, tools, events.
verdict: Well-organized, context-economical index skill: explicit trigger, consistent rules, a troubleshooting map, and declared Node.js/package requirements. Minor gaps: no negative-trigger scoping, no version/changelog signal, and the npm install of the core package is unpinned.

highlights.summary: Line 16: `npm install @cline/sdk` has no version pin — well-known package but unpinned.
No 'NOT for' or exclusion guidance found anywhere in the skill.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the skill.
